headline: Bet on Winning DuPont Analysis & Pick 5 Top Stocks
summary: Do you have more faith in DuPont analysis than in simple ROE calculation? MYR Group (MYRG), Blue Bird (BLBD), Guardian Pharmacy Services (GRDN), Ubiquiti (UI) and Everus Construction Group Inc. (ECG).

headline: BASFY Unveils World's First 3D Catalyst Plant in Ludwigshafen
summary: BASF launches first industrial 3D-printed catalyst plant, boosting efficiency, sustainability and custom solutions in chemical production.
